name: FSIL_SetBusyMode
title: FSIL_SetBusyMode
syntax: long FSIL_SetBusyMode(dbNode* fs, byte flags); // form 2
description: Activates or deactivates the busy mode of the File Server.
If at least one of the busy mode flags is set:
Even busy mode is set the File Server responds to requests of a client.

parameters.name: flags
parameters.description: bit 0: File Server is busy reading bit 1: File Server is busy writing

parameters.name: fs
parameters.description: FS simulation node to apply the function

description: Example (applicable only in a test node)
example.code:
//Set File Server for 5 sec in a bisy mode
FSIL_SetBusyMode(FileServer, 0x2) // File Server is busy writing
testWaitForTimeout(5000);  // Wait for 5000 ms
FSIL_SetBusyMode(FileServer, 0) // File Server is not busy

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
